title: General Khazard

Smells bad too. |map = {{Map|x=2723|y=3622|plane=0|r=4|mapID=0|mtype=square}} |id = 3510 |leagueRegion = Fremennik }} [[File:General Khazard (Shadow Realm) chathead.png|left]] }} '''General Khazard''', also known as Khazard, is the leader of the [[Khazard Army]]. He is a [[Zamorak]]ian [[Mahjarrat]], and the son of [[Palkeera]].{{CiteText|text=Mahjarrat notes|author=Zemouregal|quote=Khazard is the youngest of our race on Gielinor. He was born towards the end of the God Wars, shortly before the death of his mother, Palkeera.}} He has established a large territory between [[Ardougne]] and [[Yanille]] and is at war with the [[gnome]]s. He may be fought during the [[Fight Arena]] quest after killing [[Bouncer]], his pet [[hellhound]], though it is not required. He is spoken to frequently during [[The General's Shadow]] and [[Secrets of the North]]. ==History== {{References needed}} ===Early History=== General Khazard is the youngest Mahjarrat, having been born on [[Gielinor]] during the late [[Third Age]], during the [[God Wars]]. His mother [[Palkeera]] died shortly after his birth, leaving Khazard's upbringing and tutelage to her ally [[Hazeel]]. During the [[Fourth Age]], he supposedly ruled a larger area in southern [[Kandarin]] alongside Hazeel. Khazard founded [[Port Khazard]], ruling over weak-minded humans and making them his own personal army. He later had a conflict with the nearby tree gnomes and still wages war with them to this day. Khazard is considered an upstanding citizen by the kingdom of Kandarin, and he and his private army operate with [[King Lathas]]'s approval, who has at least once hired Khazard's army for peacekeeping jobs. However his conflict with the Gnome Empire makes him very controversial, and it appears the authorities of Kandarin are hesitant to get involved.{{CiteNPC|npc=Guard (Carnillean)|quote=The matter is... complicated. On paper, General Khazard is an upstanding citizen, and his private army operates with approval from the crown. King Lathas even hired them for some peacekeeping once. (...) It's fair to say that Khazard is a bit... controversial. His war with the gnomes is creating more than a few problems for Kandarin, not to mention the rumours about the people fighting in his arena...|loc=Secrets of the North|notes=|name=}} [[File:Fight Arena - Fighting General Khazard.png|thumb|left|200px|A player fights General Khazard with [[Magic]] using the [[safespot]] by trapping him behind a skeleton.]] ===Fight Arena=== General Khazard is the owner of the [[Fight Arena (location)|Khazard Fight Arena]] and the one who ordered his men to invade the [[Tree Gnome Village (location)|Tree Gnome Village]]. During the [[Fight Arena]] [[Quests|quest]], it is revealed that he kidnaps members of rich families, such as [[Lady Servil]]'s [[Sammy Servil|son]] and [[Justin Servil|husband]], and forces them to fight for their lives at his arena for the entertainment of his citizens. However, during the quest, he makes a bet with [[Player character|an adventurer]] — if they beat all of his monsters, he will set the Servil family free. The adventurer defeats all of Khazard's monsters, and an angry Khazard sets his pet [[hellhound]], [[Bouncer]], on them. The adventurer kills Bouncer, and an enraged Khazard attempts to kill the adventurer. The player can choose to either fight or flee; if they choose to fight and defeat Khazard, he will let the player go out of respect, promising to annihilate them if they ever choose to oppose him again. ===Khazard's Return=== Khazard is also featured during [[The General's Shadow]] [[Miniquests|miniquest]] where the adventurer meets Khazard's "ghost" in the Fremennik forest. The General appears to not recognize the adventurer, as he charges them with speaking to several messengers scattered across [[Gielinor]]. After this is done, Khazard tells them to visit the [[Goblin Cave]] near the [[Fishing Guild]] for their reward. The "reward", however, is a lie, as the General does indeed remember the adventurer and sets a trap for them. Upon entering the cave, the adventurer is ambushed by [[Bouncer (ghost)|Bouncer's ghost]]. The adventurer manages to kill Bouncer once again. [[File:Secrets of the North - fighting the assassin.png|thumb|200px|General Khazard fighting the [[assassin]] with the player.]] ===To the North=== During the events of [[Secrets of the North]], Khazard was summoned by [[Clivet]] (or [[Alomone]], if having sided with Hazeel during [[Hazeel Cult]]) after [[Hazeel]] requested his presence. He was irritated to see the adventurer due to their conflicts, but begrudgingly set it aside. He, the adventurer and Hazeel ventured to the north, where they entered an underground fortress and found an ancient seal guarding a door. During their investigation, they ran into an [[assassin]] and assisted the adventurer in fending them off, later standing guard at the door. After the adventurer investigated further and found a Mahjarrat named [[Jhallan]], the assassin captured him and used him to open the door. Seeing that their investigation was a failure, Khazard left a detachment of troops to stand guard at the fortress, including a [[Scout (Ghorrock Dungeon)|scout]] in the Shadow Realm in the event someone tried to enter from there. ==Dialogue== {{hastranscript|speaksin}} ==Changes== {{Subject changes header}} {{Subject changes |date = 14 June 2023 |update = Ruinous Powers Beta v2 |change = General Khazard's combat level during the fight with the [[assassin]] has been increased from 307 to 565. }} {{Subject changes |date = 11 January 2023 |update = Secrets of the North & More! |change = General Khazard has been [[graphically updated]]. }} {{Subject changes |date = 31 May 2005 |update = New Emotes And Other Tweaks |change = The NPC's sword was graphically updated. }} {{Subject changes footer}} ==Gallery== Khazard graphical update concept art.jpg|Concept art of Khazard's graphical update, by [[Mod Grub]]. ===Gallery (historical)=== Fight Arena= {|style="text-align: center" cellpadding="15" |[[File:General Khazard (historical).png|center|300x150px]] |[[File:General Khazard v1.png|center|300x150px]] |[[File:General Khazard.png|center|300x150px]] |- |[[File:General Khazard chathead v1.png]] |[[File:General Khazard chathead v1.png]] |[[File:General Khazard chathead.png]] |- |29 March 2004 –

11 January 2023 |11 January 2023 -
present |} ==Trivia== *General Khazard used to hold his two-handed sword with one hand, yet attacked with both. This is similar to [[Vannaka]], who wields both a [[dragon sq shield]] and a [[steel 2h sword]] in each hand. Moreover, his sword has the same [[attack speed]] as a [[scimitar]], namely 4. *In the [[Update:Members' quests|news post]] for Fight Arena, he was called Kazar. *During [[The General's Shadow]], Khazard remarks he used to live in the desert, like the other Mahjarrat. However, in [[The Curse of Arrav]], it is stated that Khazard was born towards the end of the [[God Wars]], long after the Mahjarrat had left [[Icthlarin]]. *In the ''RuneScape 3'' quest {{RSL|Children of Mah}}, his father is revealed to be [[Zamorak]]. *His sword seems to be one of the [[:File:Voidwaker model concepts.png|unused concepts]] for the [[Voidwaker]]. ==References== {{Reflist}} {{Mahjarrat}} {{Fight Arena}} {{The General's Shadow}} {{Secrets of the North}} [[Category:Bosses]] [[Category:Zamorakians]] [[Category:Quest monsters]]
